name: Homeworks Environmental
description: Certified mold testing and comprehensive mold inspection services for Eastern NC and Outer Banks, with 24 years of experience and A+ BBB rating, focused on independent assessments.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: It was such a pleasure dealing with Don I want everyone to know about my experience.
Prompt, personable, and professional. Reasonable costs and excellent response time.
I switched to Homeworks. I'm so glad I switched. Don is very easy to work with.
We are extremely satisfied with their professional service and quick response to the needs of our company.

sentiment.summary: Homeworks Environmental receives overwhelmingly positive sentiment with consistently high praise for professionalism, rapid service delivery, expert communication from inspector Don, and strong customer satisfaction across both residential and commercial clients.
